name: OnyxGold treatment chair
shortDescription: Black-gold luxury cosmetic chair with ergonomic backrest. Adjustable height (50–65 cm), five-arm star base with casters, durable faux leather upholstery.
description:
The OnyxGold treatment chair is the next level of professional salon furniture: combining comfort, elegance, and durability.

Its black faux leather upholstery and luxurious gold details not only make work comfortable but also elevate the exclusivity of the salon's appearance. The ergonomic backrest provides comfortable posture even during extended work, and the 50–65 cm adjustable height can be customized for any treatment.

The five-arm star base and sturdy casters guarantee stability and easy mobility. The gold lacquered elements provide a premium appearance – the OnyxGold truly decorates the treatment room like a jewel.
metaTitle: OnyxGold treatment chair | Black-gold luxury cosmetic chair
metaDescription: OnyxGold luxury cosmetic chair in black-gold finish. Ergonomic backrest, adjustable height 50–65 cm, stable wheeled base. Premium salon furniture.

featureRows.headline: Why is the OnyxGold the best choice?
featureRows.subtitle: Comfort, elegance, and durability in a single chair

features.title: Ergonomic comfort all day
features.description: The ergonomic backrest and contoured seat ensure ideal posture even during extended work. The gas spring height adjustment (50–65 cm) allows you to find the perfect position for every treatment.
features.highlight: Ergonomics designed to prevent back problems for beauticians.

features.title: Luxury black-gold design
features.description: The combination of black faux leather upholstery and gold lacquered elements gives an elegant, premium look to your salon. The OnyxGold is not just a chair – it's the jewel of the treatment room.
features.highlight: Elevate your salon's appearance to a premium level.

features.title: Stable and easy to move
features.description: The five-arm star base provides a solid foundation, while the sturdy casters allow quiet and easy movement in the salon. The durable faux leather upholstery is easy to clean and hygienic.

testimonials.name: Lakatos Réka
testimonials.text: The OnyxGold chair completely transformed my salon's overall look. <mark>My clients always comment on how elegant the treatment room is</mark>, and it's much more comfortable for me to work in all day.

faq.question: Does the OnyxGold chair need assembly?
faq.answer: Minimal assembly is required: attach the casters and gas spring to the star base, then place the seat. Assembly takes 5-10 minutes without tools.

faq.question: What material is the upholstery made of?
faq.answer: The chair features durable black faux leather upholstery that is hygienic, easy to clean, and can be disinfected. The gold details are lacquered metal elements.

faq.question: What is the weight capacity of the chair?
faq.answer: The chair is designed for professional use with its five-arm star base and sturdy frame, suitable for intensive daily use.

faq.question: How can the chair be cleaned?
faq.answer: The faux leather surface can be easily wiped down with a damp cloth or surface disinfectant. The gold details are best maintained with a soft, dry cloth.
